case_title: FELIX WILLY SANCHEZ VS. DEX FACILITY SERVICES, LLC, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, FELIX WILLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEX FACILITY SERVICES, LLC, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ED GUIEB, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF DEX FACILITY SERVICES, LLC, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MARIO R.
